entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop (Cajanus cajan) ranking fifth in importance among edible legumes globally.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Intermittent and terminal water scarcity that adversely affects crop growth.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, heavily influenced by genotype x environment interactions.

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between the genetic makeup of a plant and the environment it grows in.

entities.name: TRAIT-BASED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding approach focusing on specific traits to improve drought tolerance.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing crop varieties that can withstand drought stress.

entities.name: POST-FLOWERING DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Drought stress occurring after the flowering stage of the crop.

entities.name: NDVI
entities.description: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index, a high throughput measure used as a proxy for drought tolerance.

entities.name: SPAD CHLOROPHYLL READING
entities.description: A measure of chlorophyll content in leaves using a SPAD meter.

entities.name: SHOOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the shoot system of the plant at maturity.

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total above-ground biomass.

entities.name: POD NUMBER
entities.description: The number of pods produced per square meter.

entities.name: SEED NUMBER
entities.description: The number of seeds produced per square meter.

entities.name: YIELD COMPONENTS
entities.description: The individual traits that contribute to the overall grain yield.
